OP01-001.name: Roronoa Zoro
OP01-001.effect: [DON!! x1] [Your Turn] All of your Characters gain +1000 power.

OP01-002.name: Trafalgar Law
OP01-002.effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] ➁ (You may rest the specified number of DON!! cards in your cost area.): If you have 5 Characters, return 1 of your Characters to the owner's hand. Then, play up to 1 Character with a cost of 5 or less from your hand that is a different color than the returned Character.
